overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban street in Night City. The player character walks under an elevated highway, crosses an intersection, examines food at a street vendor stall with green neon lighting, and ascends a concrete stairway to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: exits the covered area under the overpass into the open intersection
waits at traffic light then begins crossing the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the elevated highway toward the street intersection

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt and tie walking alongside the player

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with blue neon edge lighting
yellow neon signage for MASALA STUDIOS on building facade
vertical traffic signal showing red light

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive elevated highway structure illuminated by blue neon lights. The player walks forward alongside other pedestrians, passing yellow neon signage, then emerges into an open intersection with visible traffic lights and crosswalk markings.

events.description: approaches the illuminated street food stall on the left side of the street
slows down and turns toward the food vendor stall

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and approaching the illuminated food stall with green neon lighting

notable_agents.action: futuristic red car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: outdoor food vendor with green neon lighting and red paper lanterns
red cyberpunk-style vehicle crossing the intersection

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk in the open intersection, passing a futuristic red car. The scene transitions from under the overpass to the open street, approaching a street food stall with green neon lights and red lanterns visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food vendor with display counter

events.description: examining food items in the vendor's illuminated display case
leaning in to look closely at sushi and noodle bowls on display

agents.ego_description: examining various food items displayed in the vendor's glass case, including sushi rolls and noodle bowls

notable_agents.action: vendor in green sweater standing behind the counter
customer with red hair sitting at the counter eating

entered.detail: glass counter with illuminated trays of sushi and noodles
traditional Japanese-style lanterns hanging from stall roof
green plastic stools arranged at the counter

segments.scene_description: The player stands at the street food stall, examining the illuminated display case containing various dishes. The vendor stands behind the counter while a customer eats nearby. Red paper lanterns hang overhead, and the area is lit by green neon lights.

events.description: leaves the food stall area and enters the concrete stairwell
begins ascending the illuminated concrete stairs

agents.ego_description: walking away from the stall and climbing the illuminated concrete stairs to an upper level

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with embedded linear lighting on handrails
wall with purple and blue graffiti art
purple neon sign with Japanese characters indicating vacancy and upper level

segments.scene_description: The player leaves the food stall and approaches a wide concrete staircase illuminated by linear lights along the handrails. Purple neon signage with Japanese characters marks the entrance to the upper level. The walls feature colorful graffiti art as the player ascends the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the oppressive shadow of an elevated highway into the vibrant, neon-lit activity of a city street and up toward an urban overlook. It begins beneath a massive overpass illuminated by blue neon, moving past yellow signage and pedestrians before emerging into the open air of a wide intersection. As the camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk past a futuristic red car, the environment shifts toward a street food stall characterized by glowing green neon and hanging red lanterns. The perspective lingers briefly on the illuminated display of dishes and the vendor before turning away to approach a wide concrete staircase. Finally, the scene ascends through a corridor of colorful graffiti and linear handrail lighting, guided by purple neon Japanese signage toward an upper level.
